title: AI4R CQV Output
description: Structural invariants for cqv_output.json — patch 0054. Intentionally narrow: locks down only the fields whose drift causes downstream confusion (evidence shape after 0058's coercion). Does NOT enforce the full vocabulary of every field; CQV's output evolves and over-constraint would force schema churn on every new field.

status.description: Stage outcome. Anything else is a bug — KBE/CQV/Review all share this trio.

failure_mode.description: Free-form code for non-success runs; null for success.

reproducibility_blockers.description: Issues that block reproducibility. After 0058 coercion + 0054 schema this is uniform across both model-emitted and helper-emitted entries.

id.description: Optional: id-less blockers exist as a defensive path through dedup; cite-mapping skips them downstream.

evidence.description: Canonical object-list shape (patch 0054 invariant). Legacy string and list-of-strings forms must be coerced via _coerce_evidence before this point. Field itself is optional — the K1 failure mode was inconsistent SHAPE when present, not absence.

execution_environment.description: Parsed renv.lock: R version + package list. Null when CQV failed before reaching this step.
